factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The accessory is shown being held, indicating a clear use moment.
The MagSafe feature is visually clear, indicating a specific benefit.
The arrangement of the product and hand is clear and easy to follow.
The texture and finish of the case are visible, showcasing material quality.
The Apple logo provides a strong brand trust signal.
The image has strong contrast and clear subject boundaries.
The image has a branded scene and clear product presentation, indicating campaign intent.
